title: 'Mamata Can Make 2,000 Such Videos': Amit Shah Reacts To Viral 'Sting' Video Of Humayun Kabir
description: The viral 'sting operation' video of suspended Trinamool Congress (TMC) MLA Humayun Kabir has stirred up a political storm in West Bengal ahead of the upcoming state Assembly elections. Amit Shah said Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee is "capable of producing 2000 such videos".
